lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections, and the interior shows light wear. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections but no significant damage. The interior is clean with slight wear from normal use. The engine runs well and has been maintained regularly.

Get ready for a dependable ride that's full of life! This vehicle has been a trusty companion and is in solid fair condition, showing some honest character and typical wear from its time on the road. It’s a fantastic opportunity to own a reliable car that still has plenty of miles left to offer!
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It suffers from significant mechanical problems, specifically a slipping transmission and a loud engine knock that suggests a need for a major overhaul. The body shows heavy wear, including widespread rust, multiple dents, and failing paint. The interior is similarly aged, with torn seats and several broken electronic components, including the radio and air conditioning. This car is currently not reliable for daily use and would be best suited for a mechanic or a dedicated hobbyist looking for a project.

This vehicle is in fair condition, showing clear signs of its age and regular use. The exterior paint has lost some of its original luster, with several noticeable scratches, minor dings on the passenger side, and some clear coat fading on the roof. The interior cabin shows significant wear, including some staining on the upholstery and a small tear in the driver's seat. Mechanically, the car is functional and starts reliably, though it will likely need upcoming maintenance such as new tires and a brake service in the near future. It serves as a dependable, budget-conscious option for a driver who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning motorist. Maintained with diligent care, it exhibits consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic. Every essential system has been vetted to ensure a standard of performance that meets professional expectations. This is an exemplary choice for those seeking a balance of luxury and value, offering a sophisticated driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I'm so excited to help this awesome ride find its next home! It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really solid shape, ready for plenty more adventures. It drives beautifully and has been well-loved throughout its time with me. I’m looking for a smooth, easy sale, so I’ve priced it to move quickly. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

Good condition. Clean title. Recent service history included. Minor exterior wear. Mechanically sound.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort, making it an ideal choice for a discerning driver. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that remains vibrant, with only minor, expected road wear on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment with supple leather upholstery, functional high-tech amenities, and a premium sound system. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it comes with a complete service history, including a recent comprehensive inspection, fluid flush, and new brake pads. The engine runs quietly, and the handling remains crisp and responsive. All electronics, from the adaptive cruise control to the heated seats, are fully operational. This is a dependable, well-loved vehicle that presents beautifully and is ready for many more miles of reliable service.

This impeccably maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a synthesis of reliability and sophisticated performance. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal, this model provides a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that offers exceptional value without compromising on quality or prestige.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a superior driving experience, balancing robust mechanical integrity with a refined aesthetic. It has undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and reliability. A premier selection for those seeking dependable performance and enduring value.

Hey there! You've got to check out this beauty. It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in wonderful shape, just waiting for its next adventure! It runs super smoothly and has been really well-loved over the years. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend road trip, this car is totally ready to go. Come see it for yourself—I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have!

Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean title. Recent maintenance completed.

This vehicle has been exceptionally well-cared for and presents beautifully. The exterior paint retains its original luster with only the slightest signs of road use, while the interior features pristine upholstery and a smoke-free cabin. Every electronic component, from the premium sound system to the navigation, functions perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and efficiently, backed by a comprehensive service history that proves its mechanical integrity. With recent fluid changes and tires in excellent shape, this car delivers a tight, comfortable, and reliable driving experience. It’s an ideal choice for someone seeking a high-quality pre-owned vehicle that requires zero immediate investment.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my awesome car. It’s been such a reliable companion and is still in really wonderful shape, perfect for someone who wants a solid ride without the brand-new price tag. It drives smoothly and has been well-loved over the years. I’m sad to see it go, but I know you’re going to have a blast behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing. The powertrain is mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential, delivering linear power to the rear wheels. Recent mechanical service includes a comprehensive VANOS bulletproofing and subframe reinforcement to ensure chassis longevity. The suspension retains its precision with refreshed bushings and Bilstein B6 dampers. While the exterior shows minor road-derived patina, the drivetrain remains mechanically robust with a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. A driver-spec example optimized for engagement and performance.

Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring leather upholstery that has been treated regularly to maintain its supple feel. All electronic components, from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control, function exactly as they should. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change, tire rotation, and a multi-point inspection to ensure it's ready for its next owner. This is a dependable, well-cared-for car that offers a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.
